name: Arrowroot Powder
description: A fine, silky white starch extracted from the rhizomes of Maranta arundinacea, prized for its hypoallergenic moisture absorption.
appearance: Very fine, bright white, odorless powder with a silky feel
solubility: Insoluble in cold water; gelatinizes in hot water at ~60–68°C
chemistry: Fine starch absorbing moisture without blocking pores. Silky texture. Hypoallergenic.
